violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. - Observed a dry hand sink on the line during inspection. Breakfast had already been served. - Must wash hands before gloving, between tasks and between glove changes.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. - Raw ground beef and pork belly on the same same pan in the walk in cooler.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Clean all reach ins on the line; slicer.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Hood system and surround need to be deep cleaned.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Deep clean the floors below and behind all equipment in the kitchen. Deep clean the wall under/behind the hood vent.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
